search_document:
User Request: Suppliers by country.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Suppliers by Country
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of suppliers across different countries
Title: Top Supplier Categories
Type: table
Description: Categories of suppliers with the highest count
Title: Total Number of Suppliers
Type: kpi
Description: Overall count of suppliers

sql_queries.title: Suppliers by Country
sql_queries.description: Distribution of suppliers across different countries
sql_queries.sql: SELECT "Country", COUNT("SupplierID") AS "SupplierCount" FROM "Suppliers" GROUP BY "Country" ORDER BY "SupplierCount" DESC

sql_queries.title: Top Supplier Categories
sql_queries.description: Categories of suppliers with the highest count
sql_queries.sql: SELECT "Categories"."CategoryName", COUNT("Products"."SupplierID") AS "SupplierCount" FROM "Products" JOIN "Categories" ON "Products"."CategoryID" = "Categories"."CategoryID" GROUP BY "Categories"."CategoryName" ORDER BY "SupplierCount" DESC
